title: Lamayuru Monastery
tagline: Lamayuru Monastery — spiritual town of Ladakh (UT)

overview.short: Lamayuru or Yuru Monastery (Tibetan: བླ་མ་གཡུང་དྲུང་དགོན་པ་, Wylie: bla ma gyung drung dgon pa "Eternal Monastery") is a Tibetan Buddhist monastery in Lamayouro village of Leh dist
overview.description: Lamayuru or Yuru Monastery (Tibetan: བླ་མ་གཡུང་དྲུང་དགོན་པ་, Wylie: bla ma gyung drung dgon pa "Eternal Monastery") is a Tibetan Buddhist monastery in Lamayouro village of Leh district in Ladakh in India. These natural caves were inhabited by monks for meditation, forming a cave monastery, particularly the famous "meditation cave of Naropa" (named after Naropa who was an Indian Buddhist Mahasiddha) preserved within the monastery's central hall. It is situated on the NH1 Srinagar-Leh Highway 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) east of the Fotu La at a height of 3,510 metres (11,520 ft) and 19 km southwest o

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Lamayouro
topPlaces.description: Lamayouro (also known as Lamayuru) is a village in the Sham district of Ladakh, India. The Lamayuru Monastery is located nearby.

topPlaces.name: Wanla
topPlaces.description: Wanla is a village in the Sham district of Ladakh, India. It is located in the Khalsi tehsil, on the banks of the Yapola River (also known as the Wanla river).

topPlaces.name: Wanla Monastery
topPlaces.description: Wanla Gompa is a historic Buddhist monastery on the ridge that crowns Wanla village in Ladakh, India. Its small but impressively preserved three-storeyed Avalokitesvara temple is one of the earliest known Drigung Kagyu prayer chambers to have survived in Ladakh.

topPlaces.name: Fotu La
topPlaces.description: Fotu La (Hindi: fōtu lā) or Fatu La is a mountain pass on the Srinagar-Leh highway in the Zanskar Range of the Himalayas in India. At an elevation of 4,108 metres (13,478 ft), it is the highest point on the highway, surpassing the famed Zoji La.

topPlaces.name: Yapola River
topPlaces.description: The Gyapo-La, also known as the Wanla River, is a river near Khalsi. It flows into the Indus River near Lamayuru.

topPlaces.name: Tarhipti
topPlaces.description: Tarhipti is a village in the Sham district of Ladakh, India. It is located in the Likir tehsil.

items.note: Lamayouro (also known as Lamayuru) is a village in the Sham district of Ladakh, India. The Lamayuru Monastery is located nearby.
Wanla is a village in the Sham district of Ladakh, India. It is located in the Khalsi tehsil, on the banks of the Yapola River (also known as the Wanla river).

Wanla Gompa is a historic Buddhist monastery on the ridge that crowns Wanla village in Ladakh, India. Its small but impressively preserved three-storeyed Avalokitesvara temple is one of the earliest known Drigung Kagyu prayer chambers to have survived in Ladakh.

Fotu La (Hindi: fōtu lā) or Fatu La is a mountain pass on the Srinagar-Leh highway in the Zanskar Range of the Himalayas in India. At an elevation of 4,108 metres (13,478 ft), it is the highest point on the highway, surpassing the famed Zoji La.
The Gyapo-La, also known as the Wanla River, is a river near Khalsi. It flows into the Indus River near Lamayuru.
Tarhipti is a village in the Sham district of Ladakh, India. It is located in the Likir tehsil.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lamayuru Monastery?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lamayuru Monastery is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lamayuru Monastery?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kushok Bakula Rimpochee Airport, Leh (73 km) and the nearest railway station is Katra (Vaishno Devi railhead) (222 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lamayuru Monastery?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lamayuru Monastery at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lamayuru Monastery?
faq.a: Stays in Lamayuru Monastery start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lamayuru Monastery?
faq.a: The top attractions are Lamayouro, Wanla, Wanla Monastery, Fotu La, Yapola River.
